title: tragus loliaceus
intro: Tragus loliaceus, also known as the Tragus plant or Loliaceus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tragus loliaceus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. Tragus loliaceus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
